en: Hey, didn't I tell you to get some better suits? I spent $500 for how many suits?
ko: 야, 더 좋은 양복 사라고 했잖아? 500달러로 양복 몇 벌 샀어? 다섯 벌. 뭐?

en: Five. What? In today's lesson you're going to learn some nice expressions, vocabulary, pronunciation, and legal English with the TV series Suits.
ko: 오늘 수업에서는 좋은 표현, 어휘, 발음, 그리고 드라마 수츠로 법률 영어를 배울 거예요. 오늘 보는 장면에서 하비가

en: In the scenes we're watching today Harvey tries to Mike on his first day at work after he was denied a promotion.

But then Mike gives him an idea. But before we get started, make sure you hit that subscribe button and bell down below because every week we put out lessons like this to help you understand your favorite movies and TV series without getting lost, without missing the jokes, and without subtitles.
